# Save Money & Energy
## Rebates, Incentives, and Usage Monitoring
It’s good business to be energy efficient. It’s better when you can save money doing so. Whether your business is small or large, Austin Energy’s comprehensive rebates and incentives can help you do both. 
![additionalsavings](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/additionalsavings.jpg?rev=05334e27df804451809132d296520eaa)
### [Austin Energy Rebates and Incentives](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/offerings)
Learn about our many rebates and other incentives to help your large or small business save money and energy.
![smallBusiness](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/smallBusiness.jpg?rev=7787815b5a124426b88180061c1524cb)
### [Additional Savings for Small Businesses](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/get-big-savings/sb-bundle)
Austin Energy’s Small Business Bundle can provide LED lighting, an HVAC tune-up, and smart thermostat upgrades at little to no cost.
![mfrebates](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/mfrebates.jpg?rev=4570ceea905a4f98ba29061a3b8107ea)
### [Energy-Efficiency Incentives for Multifamily Properties](https://savings.austinenergy.com/multifamily/offerings)
Our rebates and other incentives can help make your property more energy efficient.
![CommercialWebApp](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/CommercialWebApp.jpg?rev=42b0b55a4d4e4699b8ac158e105ef5f4)
### [Monitor Your Energy Usage](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/com-app)
The Austin Energy App helps you manage your business's costs.
![Showing someone the Energy Profiler Online](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/Com-EPO-270x189.jpg?rev=841a16ae3dd0475bb83e922102ee0cf4)
### [Energy Profiler Online](https://savings.austinenergy.com/commercial/learn/manage-your-usage/energy-profiler-online)
Detailed reporting and load profiling for customers with complex business operations or multiple accounts.
![AE_web_commercial_250x159](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/AE_web_commercial_250x159.jpg?rev=01acc6220b454eb986926f54f15f6e97)
### [Austin Energy Green Building](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building)
Building green for your business results in a healthier, more comfortable work environment and less costly maintenance.
![businessChargingStation](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Commercial/Images/businessChargingStation.jpg?rev=b4eaaa3e64a744b78103ee79ba5c9378)
### [Plug-In Austin Rebates for Businesses](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/workplace-charging)
Austin Energy offers rebates to businesses that install faster, Level 2 charging stations.
Date last reviewed or modified: 11/19/2024

[District Energy & Cooling Design](https://austinenergy.com/contractors/district-energy-and-cooling "District Energy & Cooling Design")
  * [District Energy & Cooling Design](https://austinenergy.com/contractors/district-energy-and-cooling/district-energy-and-cooling "District Energy & Cooling Design")


# District Energy & Cooling Design
## Criteria for Connecting To and Working On District Cooling Systems
District cooling provides customers with their HVAC requirements through a network of underground pipes. A district cooling plant distributes chilled water (approximately 44 to 45 degrees) to the customer's building through a set of heat exchangers that are located in the customer's mechanical room. A single plant can meet the cooling needs of several buildings. Austin Energy currently has district cooling systems in the central business district, the Domain, the Robert Mueller Municipal Airport Redevelopment Zone, and Austin Community College Highland Campus. 
Follow our criteria, requirements, and guidelines when connecting to or working on district cooling systems to ensure your facilities are built properly. 
The documents listed below will be updated annually and are for the current year. If you need earlier versions, email District Energy and Cooling Design. 
###  Safety and Clearance Requirements 
Contractors, building owners, and engineers who work near or on our chilled water transmission pipe should review section 1.15.0 of the [Austin Energy Design Criteria Manual (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/designCriteriaManual.pdf?rev=e956dce6768341e087d41e6a3bc3d44e&sc_lang=en&hash=40AFFE33C560E0B3A80AB54571443D53) for information about district energy and cooling clearance zones and requirements for contractors. 
###  Right of Way Design and Specifications 
In addition to the Austin Energy Design Criteria Manual, please follow these specifications and details when building, maintaining, or repairing our chilled water transmission piping and customer service piping in the right of way. 
  * [District Energy and Cooling Standard City Details (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Standard_City_Details.pdf?rev=ecbb02b99abf4758a781d1ddf4612ef1&sc_lang=en&hash=20BC1E471E54B94DC118AB8F3EC611A3)
  * [District Energy and Cooling Standard City Specifications (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Standard_City_Specs.pdf?rev=d1444eab9fb449e99dc720173b0bf30b&sc_lang=en&hash=316C71272F054C702A4012FF49969B70)
  * [District Energy and Cooling Special Specifications (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Special_Specs.pdf?rev=df2d5eb238de4aa19f91e8364acba1ee&sc_lang=en&hash=FDCCA5278DB25FBD90E812EA78738E5B)
  * [District Energy and Cooling Special AE Details (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Special_Details.pdf?rev=b50e99c241114066a9602dcea9099eed&sc_lang=en&hash=A8F245D65DCBB69CC2E5E64ECEBE994B)


###  Customer Connection Requirements 
These documents define Austin Energy requirements for buildings that are connected to our chilled water pipeline. 
  * [Customer Connection Requirements (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Customer_Connection_Reqs.pdf?rev=ce0b1613ccdf476c9eb16daf825c17a1&sc_lang=en&hash=0AD00677311A47EB130CC4D4FC2816FF) — Details requirements for the building owner or contractor to adhere to when using chilled water. 
  * [Best Practices (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Best_Practices.pdf?rev=104401f4c2ea4058ac45e59b82e722a5&sc_lang=en&hash=1A94F0518D2A23724273BC7ECF1DE66A) — Lists a set of design considerations for the design engineer when designing the building’s HVAC system. 
  * [Customer Easement Information (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/PDFs/CWBlanketEasementTemplate.pdf?rev=e58bd03de9a1490086ec2ef9ae3b73fb&sc_lang=en&hash=97B2F8D2803ADF552BBBFAB24E937ED7) — Defines the type of easements required by the building owner. 


###  Mechanical Room / Plant Design and Specifications 
These documents define Austin Energy's requirements for building mechanical rooms and chiller plant design. These specifications are used for our chilled water systems inside our building mechanical rooms. The MEP design criteria manual will define requirements for our chilled water plants. 
  * [Austin Energy Mechanical Room Specifications (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Mech_Rm_Specs.pdf?rev=ff5beba0a643401a949bfdfcc2ace3a2&sc_lang=en&hash=CB0F3BA3C6854BA32ABBE5D6D06DDF37)
  * [Austin Energy Mechanical Room Details (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_Mech_Rm_Details.pdf?rev=97841f9835c84d609b53b79531502b79&sc_lang=en&hash=2A33AFDFF3726FD9F3AF29FACB6DBC27)
  * [Austin Energy DEC MEP Design Criteria Manual (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Contractors/District-Energy-Cooling/DEC_DCM_MEP.pdf?rev=7231be2c6d0147cd8b1199d5a9ecc680&sc_lang=en&hash=AF7955CB1634BE5B907753A28F9C8BA3)


###  Additional Resources 
District Energy and Cooling specifications reference the following resources: 
  * [City of Austin Technical Criteria Manuals](https://library.municode.com/tx/austin)
  * [City of Austin Utility Criteria Manual (pdf)](https://library.municode.com/tx/austin/codes/utilities_criteria_manual)
  * [City of Austin Code of Ordinances](https://library.municode.com/tx/austin/codes/code_of_ordinances)
  * [Right of Way Solicitations at Austin Finance Online (enter “chilled water” in the search box)](https://financeonline.austintexas.gov/afo/account_services/solicitation/solicitations.cfm)


###  Contact Us 
Email: Austin Energy District Energy and Cooling

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

    * [Landfill Solar RFP](https://austinenergy.com/contractors/working-with-austin-energy/rfps/Landfill-Solar-RFP "Landfill Solar RFP")
    * [Wind Energy Resources RFP](https://austinenergy.com/contractors/working-with-austin-energy/rfps/Wind-Energy-Resources-RFP "Wind Energy Resources RFP")


# Working with Austin Energy
## A Variety of Opportunities are Available
Austin Energy works with trade and building professionals in the Austin area to help serve the needs of our community. 
Local participating contractors and building and design professionals work closely with us and our customers on improvements and projects that help conserve energy, save money, and maintain or increase comfort in homes or businesses. 
###  Register as a Vendor with the City of Austin 
Austin Energy works with a variety of vendors to help with operations and projects. We especially encourage local and women- or minority-owned businesses to work with us. 
To become an Austin Energy vendor, [you must first register with the City of Austin's Vendor Connection](https://financeonline.austintexas.gov/afo/afo_content.cfm?s=17). 
Registering allows you to: 
  * List your products or services with the City 
  * Receive solicitation notices when your product or services meet our business needs 
  * Look for different types of solicitations, and see when master agreements expire and are ready for re-solicitation 


####  Women- and Minority-Owned Businesses Encouraged 
We encourage women- and minority-owned businesses to take advantage of business opportunities with Austin Energy. We can help you navigate the [Vendor Connection registration](https://financeonline.austintexas.gov/afo/afo_content.cfm?s=17) and [certification](https://www.austintexas.gov/small-minority-business/divisions/certification-division "certification processes") processes. 
If you need further assistance, call the Austin Energy Purchasing Office at 512-974-2500. 
[Learn more at Austin Small and Minority Business Resources](https://www.austintexas.gov/department/small-and-minority-business-resources-0 "Learn more at Austin Small and Minority Business Resources")
####  Find a Payment Status 
To find a payment status, first contact your project manager. If you can’t reach your project manager, call Austin Energy Purchasing at 512-974-2500. 
For the payment status on construction projects, call Contract Management at 512-974-5632. 
###  Explore Our Participating Contractor Opportunities 
Our customers use our listings of registered contractors to select companies to perform energy efficiency installations, audits, and other services. Austin Energy has many opportunities for registered local businesses and providers to perform these services to our customers: 
  * [Contractor disconnects and reconnects for residential electric service rebuilds](https://austinenergy.com/contractors/working-with-austin-energy/contractor-disconnect-program) — We enable eligible electrical contractors to perform residential service rebuilds on behalf of Austin Energy.  

  * [Participating contractors for energy efficiency rebate and incentive programs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/contractors) — Austin Energy works with local, trained professionals who make energy efficiency improvements through our [Rebates and Incentives Programs](https://savings.austinenergy.com/ "Rebates and Incentives").  

  * [Registered Solar Photovoltaic (PV) installers](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/participating-solar-contractors/become-a-participating-solar-contractor) — Austin Energy maintains a list of solar professionals in the Austin area. These participating contractors are eligible to offer Austin Energy incentives to customers who install solar power at their homes or businesses  

  * [Certified Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure (ECAD) energy professionals](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/energy-professionals/become-energy-professional) — The [Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure (ECAD) ordinance](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance "Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure \(ECAD\) ordinance") requires that ECAD audits be performed by certified energy professionals. ECAD Energy Professionals perform energy audits on residential and multifamily properties. They can also provide assistance for commercial facilities. 


###  Design and Build Green 
Austin Energy Green Building (AEGB) collaborates directly with building industry professionals who are working hard to shape our city to create a more environmentally friendly, sustainable, and healthy Austin. 
When you rate your building with Austin Energy Green Building, you contribute to Austin’s environmental and sustainability goals and earn recognition for your work. Our team approach to construction makes it easier to incorporate green building principles at every step of a project. 
[Learn more about Austin Energy Green Building's information for design and building professionals](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/design-build/design-build)
###  Requests for Proposals (RFPs) 
Austin Energy periodically issues RFPs directed to qualified and experienced companies who develop and build energy resources, particularly those who provide renewable and/or stored energy. RFPs are posted on our website, along with submission deadlines and other relevant information. 
[Browse our current requests for proposals](https://austinenergy.com/contractors/working-with-austin-energy/rfps)
Date last reviewed or modified: 11/21/2025

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

Pay anytime day or night – on the phone or online. Multiple payment methods accepted. Transaction fees apply.

![Get Alerts and Updates](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/shared/alerts-rebrand.png?rev=960e088a00ba421a9f0a9378adb23217)
### [Get Outage Alerts](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Outage-Alerts)
You can register to report outages and get text alerts on your mobile phone.
[Learn more about Outage Alerts](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Outage-Alerts)
![Austin Energy Incentives](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/shared/incentives-rebrand.png?rev=fad8b3d5e3c94d348b0647665058764e)
### [Save With Rebates & Incentives](https://savings.austinenergy.com/)

[Get rebate info](https://savings.austinenergy.com/)
![Get Current Events](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/shared/electricity-rebrand.png?rev=49df4584702f4c30a4db60d0b64f3c95)
### [Check Current Conditions](https://austinenergy.com/outages/current-conditions)
Get the latest info about large-scale outage and emergency situations.
[Get updates and learn how to stay safe](https://austinenergy.com/outages/current-conditions)
Apr 15, 2026, 2:45:00 PM CDT
### [See Our Power Generation Mix](https://austinenergy.com/about/company-profile/environment/renewable-power-generation)
Renewable energy relies upon available wind and sunshine. The output varies day to day and hour to hour.
[See today’s generation mix](https://austinenergy.com/about/company-profile/environment/renewable-power-generation)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure Ordinance
## Required Energy Audits Help Identify Savings Opportunities
[ The Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure (ECAD) ordinance, as described in Chapter 6-7 Energy Conservation of the Austin City Code (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/ECAD/ECADChap6-7EnergyConservation.pdf?rev=4567fae1e00a429c81ea63d30fd934cb&sc_lang=en&hash=91A8D4C01EF8327FEADE80CABE07CE65 "The Energy Conservation Audit and Disclosure \(ECAD\) ordinance, as described in Chapter 6-7 Energy Conservation of the Austin City Code"), requires energy audits and disclosures for all homes and buildings which are served by Austin Energy and located within Austin city limits. 
ECAD promotes energy efficiency by identifying potential energy-saving improvements in homes, businesses, and multifamily properties. Improving energy efficiency in your home or business can: 
  * Make your home or business more comfortable 
  * Increase the value and marketability of your property 
  * Improve indoor air quality 
  * Save money and energy 


ECAD Compliance Notices
Official ECAD ordinance letters and notifications come only from the City of Austin, on City of Austin letterhead. The City of Austin does not endorse or approve any communications, solicitations or marketing materials from outside vendors regarding ECAD compliance.
Disclosure Varies by Property Type  |  What Does ECAD Require?  |  What Do I Do?  |  Learn More   
---|---|---|---  
Residential   
**Do you own a house and want to sell?** |  Before selling your home, you must have an energy audit done if your home is 10 years or older. You must disclose the results to potential buyers. Exemptions or variances may apply.  |  Get a qualified [ECAD Energy Professional](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/energy-professionals/energy-professionals "ECAD Energy Professional") to conduct the energy audit.  |  [ECAD for Residential Customers](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/ecad-for-residential-customers/ecad-for-residential-customers "ECAD for Residential Customers")  
**Do you own a duplex, triplex, or fourplex and want to sell?** |  Before selling your property, you must have an energy audit done if your property is 10 years or older. You must disclose the results to potential buyers. Exemptions or variances may apply.  |  Get a qualified [ECAD Energy Professional](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/energy-professionals/energy-professionals "ECAD Energy Professional") to conduct the energy audit.  |  [ECAD for Residential Customers](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/ecad-for-residential-customers/ecad-for-residential-customers "ECAD for Residential Customers")  
**Is there a residential property you want to buy? Are you a real estate agent?** |  Sellers are required to conduct an energy audit on homes 10 years or older before sale and provide the results to buyers.  |  Ask the seller or seller's real estate agent for the energy audit results.  |  [ECAD for Residential Customers](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/ecad-for-residential-customers/ecad-for-residential-customers "ECAD for Residential Customers")  
Commercial   
**Do you own or manage a commercial building that is 10,000 sq ft or larger?** |  You must report your Energy Rating to the City of Austin by June 1 of each year.  |  [Use one of two reporting options](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-commercial-buildings/for-commercial-buildings "Use one of two reporting options") to get your Energy Rating and report it to the City.  |  [ECAD for Commercial Buildings](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-commercial-buildings/for-commercial-buildings "ECAD for Commercial Buildings")  
Multifamily   
**Do you own or manage a property with five or more residential units?** |  You must conduct a specialized energy audit of your property the year it turns 10 years old. You must make Energy Audit results available to potential and current residents.  |  Get a qualified [ECAD Energy Professional](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/energy-professionals/energy-professionals "ECAD Energy Professional") to conduct the energy audit.  |  [ECAD for Multifamily Properties](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-multifamily-properties/for-multifamily-properties "ECAD for Multifamily Properties")  
**Are you a resident in a property with five or more residential units?** **Are you interested in moving to one?** |  Multifamily properties are required to conduct specialized energy audits for properties 10 years or older. They must make the results available to potential and current residents.  |  Ask your property manager for Energy Audit results.  |  [ECAD for Multifamily Properties](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-multifamily-properties/for-multifamily-properties "ECAD for Multifamily Properties")  
**What do I do if an energy audit determines that my property is a High Energy Use Property?** |  High Energy Use properties use 150% over average energy use for similar properties. These properties must reduce energy use by 20% and provide a High Energy Use report to current and prospective residents.  |  Austin Energy offers [incentives for energy efficiency improvements](https://savings.austinenergy.com/ "incentives for energy efficiency improvements") that help reduce energy use.  |  [ECAD for Multifamily Properties](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/ecad-ordinance/for-multifamily-properties/for-multifamily-properties "ECAD for Multifamily Properties")  
###  Contact Us 
Please email ECAD or call 512-482-5346 if you have any questions or need additional information about the ECAD ordinance. 
Date last reviewed or modified: 03/29/2024

##### About Our Translations

As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。

Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Austin Energy Green Building
## Sustainable, Healthy Solutions for Home, Community, and Business
![The 700-acre Mueller development is the largest neighborhood of single family, multifamily and commercial AEGB rated buildings.](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/AEGB/AEGBLandingPage.jpg?rev=9f7ccb22a77f457aab580540c52c5edf&hash=E71F1C8E23115144D6C2D2EB14DD6ADD)
_The 700-acre Mueller development is the largest neighborhood of single family, multifamily, and commercial AEGB rated buildings. ©Catellus_
### Our Story: Leadership, Innovation, and Planning
![Healthy buildings, healthy people — healthy communities! ©Kimberly Davis](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/GB-Landing-Page/gbLanding1.jpg?rev=fdf2edc652ff405c90e24087cee09421&hash=AA7A7970F1C9B2D02EDD589B29847730) ©Kimberly Davis
Austin Energy Green Building (AEGB) cultivates innovation in building for the enrichment of the community’s environmental, economic, and human well-being. In 1991, AEGB developed the first rating system in the U.S. for evaluating the sustainability of buildings, inspiring many cities to follow.
We work with the public and building professionals to guide and build green projects that contribute positively to the city’s environmental goals and make Austin a more sustainable place to live for generations to come.
[Learn about our history and leadership in sustainability](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/our-story)
* * *
### Design and Build Green: Information for Design and Building Professionals
![Dell Children’s Medical Center](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/GB-Landing-Page/gbLanding2.jpg?rev=2ee3b5b73bf54af58f441dadd78e2409&hash=D7C41C5A75CBEDBA1639512489799DBE) ©Marc M. Swendner, Seton Healthcare Family
AEGB provides design tools and rates the sustainability of new and remodeled buildings for single family, multifamily, and commercial projects. See how you can get a rating for your project, if a rating is required, and discover how your project benefits from the rating process.
[Learn the benefits of partnering with Austin Energy Green Building](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/design-build/why-green)
[Determine if your building needs a rating ](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/design-build/get-started)
[Get started by registering your project in our Online Rating System (ORS)](https://www.greenbuildingsystem.austinenergy.com/Login/HowToParticipate.aspx)
**Already registered?**[Login to ORS](https://www.greenbuildingsystem.austinenergy.com/Login/Login.aspx "AEGB Online Rating System Login")
* * *
### Learn and Connect: Attend Green Building Events
![Cool House Tour attendees, 2014](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/GB-Landing-Page/gbLanding3.jpg?rev=c52ebbf076d442f09258201fe3018fad&hash=64C7AD95C8373F5ED6AA2D052E6A29F8) ©Sherwin Fields
We are passionate about creating educational opportunities with community partners to help everyone learn about the benefits of green building. Looking for AIA or GBCI continuing education credits? AEGB offers free monthly seminars for professionals.
[Sign up for a green building seminar or workshop](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/learn-connect)
**Next Up: Mastering Manual J and COMcheck**
Designing insulated buildings with proper mechanical equipment and lighting is key to optimizing energy efficiency and comfort. This seminar explores practical approaches to achieving those goals while meeting energy code requirements.
[Get details on Mastering Manual J and COMcheck](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/learn-connect/Mastering-Manual-J-and-COMcheck)
* * *
### Live and Work Green: How to Buy, Remodel, or Rent a Green Building
![The Gables Park Tower](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/GB-Landing-Page/gbLanding4.jpg?rev=c665cc5174cd4dd4895c6d789d727943&hash=44283A8D30AF084D3E72AB3AA0295A74) ©Gables Residential
Whether your build or buy, great buildings don’t just happen — they are planned green from the blueprints to the build out. There are also many ways to go green if you rent.
[Get details and resources for green building and green living options in Austin](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/live-work)
[Plan your green home](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/live-work/plan-green-home)
[Renovate your existing home](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/live-work/renovate)
[Buy a green home](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/live-work/buy)
[Rent green](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/live-work/rent)
* * *
### Partner and Plan: Build Partnerships for Sustainability
![Collaborating with community stakeholders helps meaningfully shape the City of Austin’s sustainability initiatives.](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Energy-Efficiency/GB-Landing-Page/gbLanding5.jpg?rev=893e90856ba24a34b9c016014a3e901c&hash=6E80A9F4F9BDDC653D70E745DA1DAA62)
AEGB recognizes the power of aligning and uniting with community focused organizations. We welcome the opportunity for such partnerships. Reach out to discuss how we can advocate together to set the course for Austin’s green future.
[See how our standards and community partnerships help meet City sustainability goals](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/partner)
[Read up on City policies, building codes, and development agreements that include green building](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/design-build)
* * *
###  Stay Connected
  * [Follow us on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/austinenergy "Austin Energy on Facebook")
  * [Subscribe to our online newsletter](https://visitor.r20.constantcontact.com/manage/optin?v=0017c4RbpK6sMlkartDjsXZyfwfHCFn9zTcVBuf55axMYcrnAVzyGNyJYXVPtWyreran9l0a3AailnDyYjrtlwM0RJYA6pEWHQrkHfadmfh4pA%3D "Austin Energy Green Building e-newsletter") to stay up to date with our upcoming events
  * Phone: 512-482-5300
  * Email: Austin Energy Green Building (AEGB)


###  Learn More 
  * [Get inspired — explore our case studies](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/case-studies "Green Building Case Studies")
  * [Plan your green home](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/live-work/plan-green-home)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Charging, Incentives and Resources
## A Guide for Drivers, Riders, and Property Owners to Navigate the EV Landscape 
### EVolved Performance Vehicles
![Buyer's Guide](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/EV/EVBuyersGuideYouTubeImage.jpg?h=auto&w=500&rev=3295d5bbf0874bee8a330d2391759178&hash=A90244F76D86F09553E9B79B4115DEF4)
Electric vehicles have better performance, fuel efficiency, and driving experience. EVs offer instant torque, smooth acceleration, and stability. If you want to check out a new or used EV or take one for a test drive at a local dealership, go to the [Austin Energy EV Buyer’s Guide](https://ev.austinenergy.com/).
  * **Local rebates:**[Austin Energy’s E-Ride rebate is up to $1,300](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/more-ways-to-go-electric/e-ride-rebate) for buying eligible E-Bikes such as scooters, mopeds, and motorcycles.


### EVerything You Need to Know About Charging in Austin
![Electric Vehicle Charging](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/EV/shutterstock_550x367.jpg?rev=98814587611a469e98d67c86ce711d1a&hash=7E0346DC1B08C3E65597D17180118653)
What is Level 2, and DC Fast Charging, and how do you choose the right one for your EV? Learn more at our [Charging 101](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/EVerything-Charging). 
  * **[Charge-On-The-Go](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/EVerything-Charging): **Austin Energy offers charging options for EVeryone. No subscription required.
  * **For homeowners:** One of the biggest perks of driving an EV is to charge right at home while you sleep. Austin Energy offers [a rebate for a Level 2 home charger](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/home-charging) or you can charge with a regular outlet.
  * **Extra rewards:** Get bill credits for using your home charger during periods of low energy demand through [Power Partner℠ EV](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/power-partner-ev).
  * **For businesses:** An EV charging station is a big customer draw. Austin Energy has a rebate of up to $5,000 to cut costs on installation. Learn more at [Plug-In Austin EV Charging Station Rebate](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/workplace-charging).


### EV and Emerging Technology: Our Story
![Industry Day](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/EV/EE_YouTube_IndustryDay.jpg?rev=d9f0d1d8af284fed9e9b108280768caf&hash=E834F878997B3FF54BBC5417567CB0DD)
Austin Energy has been a leader in electric mobility and promoting sustainability for almost 20 years. Their commitment to electric vehicles has helped make Austin one of the top three cities in the nation for EV ownership. The [Electric Vehicles and Emerging Technology](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/plug-in-austin/evet-our-story) team actively engages with the community through education campaigns and events.
  * **EVs are for Everyone:** A comprehensive initiative aimed at promoting electric mobility across the Austin community.
  * **EVs for Schools:** Austin Energy collaborates with local school districts to promote electric vehicle (EV) adoption and environmental awareness.
  * **Austin Energy Powers Electrify Expo:** North America’s Largest EV Festival helps to make EV technology available to everyday people and impact the future of mobility.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# It's Easy to Choose Green Power
## Subscribe to Renewable Energy for Your Home or Business 
![](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Wind-Energy/CRS263766GreenChoicesitebanner1100x500.jpg?h=500&w=1100&rev=0c66b53845524a7cadbb8acfbaae709a&hash=A3529F6287218C6A7180D5C590A48FC2)
Have you seen all the wind turbines and solar panels around Texas lately? You can benefit from the wind and solar energy they produce to power your home or business when you sign up for GreenChoice. 
### For Your Home
Harness clean Texas **renewable** power at a smart, convenient price. 
  * **Simple pricing:** Add only $0.0075 (three-quarters of a penny) per kilowatt-hour.
  * **Typical cost:** About $7.50 more per month based on 1,000 kWh of use.
  * **Flexible terms:** No contract, no expiration date, no subscriber fee, and no penalty to unsubscribe.


Join your neighbors in choosing clean energy from Texas wind and solar. 
[Enroll in GreenChoice today](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/greenchoice#gcform)
  * For Your Business
Austin Energy offers multiple ways for commercial customers to join GreenChoice. This table can help you find the one that’s right for you. 
GreenChoice Business Offerings | **BusinessCents** | **Energizer** | **Patron**  
---|---|---|---  
**GreenChoice Charge** | Replaces the Power Supply Adjustment (PSA) at an additional 3/4 of one penny per kilowatt-hour (kWh)  | Replaces the Power Supply Adjustment (PSA) at an additional 1/2 of one penny per kilowatt-hour (kWh)   
**Eligibility** | Commercial account in good standing not currently subscribed to GreenChoice   
**Minimum Subscription** | 100% of account kWh | 100% of account kWh | 100% of account kWh OR a block of 100,000 kWh per month  
**Benefits** | Energy usage billed at GreenChoice rates has zero emissions. This typically covers 100% of a subscriber's energy consumption.  |  Energy usage billed at GreenChoice rates has zero emissions. This typically covers 100% of a subscriber's energy consumption. Allows qualification* for the following:
    * [EPA Green Power Partner Program](https://www.epa.gov/greenpower)
    * [Austin Energy Green Building ratings](https://austinenergy.com/energy-efficiency/green-building/design-build/get-started)
    * [City of Austin’s Green Business Leaders](https://www.austintexas.gov/department/austin-green-business-leaders)
    * [Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED) credits](https://www.usgbc.org/leed)  
**Contracts** | No contract required   
(Letter of Acceptance to confirm billing)   
| 12-month contract | 12-month contract  
**Commitment** |  No penalty for unsubscribing _If canceled, eligible to re-subscribe on January 1 of following year_ |  12-month commitment _After the contract, may continue on a month-to-month basis_ |  5-year commitment  
_* Please refer to each program for its requirements._ |   


### Make an Impact with 100% Texas Wind and Solar Energy
More than 20,500 customers subscribed to GreenChoice in 2024, and together their choice made a big difference.* 
![save trees](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/-/media/project/websites/austinenergy/green-power/wind-energy/trees.png)
Removed as much carbon dioxide from the air as **313,096 acres of U.S. forests** absorb in one year.
![wind energy](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/-/media/project/websites/austinenergy/green-power/wind-energy/wind.png)
Powered **43,700 homes** with clean, renewable energy instead of fossil fuels.
![wind energy](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/-/media/project/websites/austinenergy/green-power/wind-energy/car-emissions.png)
Together, GreenChoice customers prevented emissions equal to **794+ million miles of driving** — that’s like skipping more than 3.9 million Austin-to-Dallas trips in gas cars.
_*The[EPA Greenhouse Gas Equivalencies Calculator](https://www.epa.gov/energy/greenhouse-gas-equivalencies-calculator) is used to calculate equivalency numbers._
Join your neighbors in building a cleaner, more sustainable future for Austin.

###  **GreenChoice Energy Is Green-e** ® **Energy Certified**
**[![](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Images/G-e-Energy-Certified.jpg?rev=a63a4084a84a486f9b377a2baf70d583&hash=0E1D42360FFEE42300A96A754FFE532D)](http://www.green-e.org/ "GE Energy Certified")**
GreenChoice is Green-e Energy certified and meets the environmental and consumer-protection standards set forth by the nonprofit Center for Resource Solutions. Learn more at [www.green-e.org](http://www.green-e.org "Green-e Energy Certification").
  * [Price, terms, and conditions (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Wind-Energy/GreenE_PriceTerms.pdf?rev=d7d23a71b2eb44449608e95de53a4339&sc_lang=en&hash=AEC909CB7666FC2CD657561F83E88265)

##### About Our Translations

As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。

Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Solar Solutions
## Solar for Your Home or Business
Are you ready to power up with sunshine and savings? Austinites are embracing solar as a clean, green, alternative source of power.
### Solar Power: Good for Austin, Good for the Environment
When you use clean, renewable solar power for your home or business you help reduce Austin's carbon footprint and help protect the environment.
![Man and his daughter holding a solar panel](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Solar/SolarPanel_residentialcustomer400.png?rev=7137c7bdf3674bfeb298309075a83915&hash=BBBD646DFA1DFE00C28064D0EB3A86E5)
### As a residential customer, you can:
  * Earn 9.91 cents/kWh in Value of Solar Bill Credits that apply to the electric charges on your utility bill.
  * Explore tax benefits for solar installations.
  * Earn rebates from Austin Energy that can help with the installation.


[Learn more about Solar for Your Home](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/for-your-home)
![Two professionals on a commercial roof with solar panels](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Solar/SolarPanelsCommercial400.png?rev=525c3f2c8c1e4a91b03bfb7ea740c68a&hash=7947D6ED92A04971A727EF36ACBF9DDA)
### As a commercial customer, your business or non-profit can:
  * Earn up to 9.91 cents/kWh in Value of Solar Bill Credits that apply to the electric charges on your utility bill.
  * Explore tax benefits for solar installations.
  * Apply for incentives from Austin Energy that can help with installation costs.
  * Host a Community Solar project on your property.
  * Earn Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED) certification points.


[Learn more about Incentives for Installing Solar at Your Business or Non-profit](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/for-business)
[Learn about hosting Community Solar installations through the Solar Standard Offer Program](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/solar-standard-offer-program)
### Learn More
  * [Explainer: How Solar Works](https://view.genially.com/687012489c16054d75053ec8)

  * [En Español: Guía del cliente de Austin Energy: Preguntas para realizar a los contratistas solares (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Solar/helpfulQuestionsForSolarCustomerToAskContractorsSpanish.pdf?rev=1947026a375746be9648c262f3ba8297&hash=E132BE199E29FA48CB88BD9F17D0F839)
  * [Solar Ready Checklist (pdf)](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Green-Power/Solar/SolarReadyChecklist.pdf?rev=b6ec811bf3e94c8a9f182f346978b21f&hash=24A71A2A20CB689E1CDBD4CBAC138983)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Report Outages
## Three Ways to Report Outages and Get Status Updates
If you experience a power outage, it’s easy to notify Austin Energy online, by text message, or by phone. We’ll restore power as quickly as possible.
  1. **Online** — [Report an outage online](https://austinenergy.ifactornotifi.com/ui/outage-reporting/) and [check the Outage Map](https://outagemap.austinenergy.com/) for status updates.  
  

  2. **By text message** — Text **OUT** to **287846** to register. Austin Energy will text you back with status updates, as available.  
  
If you are not already registered for text alerts, the system may prompt you for the phone number associated with your account or your account number. [Learn more about Outage Alerts](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Outage-Alerts)   
  

  3. **By phone** – call **512-322-9100**


### Helpful Tips
  1. Before reporting a power outage, please check your breakers if you can do so safely.
  2. [Check the Outage Map](https://outagemap.austinenergy.com/) to see if an outage has already been reported in your neighborhood.


### Learn More
  * [Be prepared for outages before they occur](https://austinenergy.com/outages/plan-ahead)
  * [Learn how Austin Energy prepares for power outages](https://austinenergy.com/outages/plan-ahead/How-We-Prepare-for-Outages)
  * [Learn how to read the Outage Map](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Using-the-Outage-Map)
  * [Know how to stay safe during an outage](https://austinenergy.com/outages/plan-ahead/Outage-Safety)
  * [Get current outage news](https://austinenergy.com/outages/current-conditions)
  * [Learn what causes power outages](https://austinenergy.com/outages/current-conditions/outage-causes)


[](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Data/Power-Outage-Spanish-Chicklet "Power Outage Spanish Chicklet")[![Thunder Bolt](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Chicklets/spanishChckletIcon2.png?rev=7b30b1aab96e48b5b1e16ea2443ebb54&w=60&hash=682CD6D342C8FB0B4A6E1C91A823ACC7)](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages)
¿Habla español?
**[Consulte el mapa de apagones de Austin Energy](https://outagemap.austinenergy.com/external/default.html?language=es-ES)** para ver si se ha reportado algún apagón.
Puede seleccionar el idioma español en el mapa e introducir su dirección en el campo de búsqueda para localizar su área en el mapa.
Puede reportar un apagón y también inscribirse para recibir **[alertas de apagones](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Outage-Alerts)** en su teléfono celular.
**¿Desea inscribirse para recibir alertas de apagones?**  
Envíe REGISTRO (o REG) por mensaje de texto a 287846.
**¿Preguntas?**  
Llame al 512-494-9400 y presione el 2 para hablar con un representante en español.

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

  * [Approved Electric Rates](https://austinenergy.com/rates/approved-rates-schedules/approved-electric-rates "Approved Electric Rates")


# Approved Electric Rates
## Fiscal Year 2026
### New Rates and Fees start Nov. 1
Every year, the Austin City Council approves the rates and fees customers pay on their City of Austin Utilities bill. That includes Austin Energy’s rates, which are increasing this year in response to rising costs, along with the need to maintain reliability and improve grid infrastructure. Below are some of the changes that go into effect Nov. 1.
  * Base rates for electric service increased by 5%, including a $1.50 increase to the residential Customer Charge.
  * The Community Benefit Charge went up by around 27%.
  * The Regulatory Charge stayed the same. 


### Pass-through charges
The Power Supply Adjustment (PSA) is a dollar-for-dollar recovery that may be adjusted monthly via the PSA Administrative Adjustment to reflect current power supply costs. The overall PSA effective Nov.1, 2025, is approximately 19% lower than the rate in effect on Dec. 1, 2023.
### Fee Schedules (Effective November 1, 2025 through October 31, 2026)

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Residential Rates
## Rates for Customers Who Live Inside the City of Austin
Thank you for being an Austin Energy customer. Austin Energy, a service of the City of Austin, structures rates into five billing components (Customer Charge, Energy Charge, Power Supply Adjustment, Community Benefit Charges, and Regulatory Charge). These charges are factored into your electric bill each month. Taken together, Austin Energy’s goal is to have average system rates in the lower 50% of similar utilities in Texas.
### Inside City of Austin Rates: Four-Tier Rate Structure
Austin Energy has a four-tier rate structure that allows those with lower use to have lower rates — and thus lower bills. You can conserve electricity by modifying your energy use or by making energy efficiency improvements to your home.
Austin Energy Residential Electric Rates **Billing Components** |  | **Inside Residential**  
---|---|---  
**Customer Charge ($ per month)** | $16.50  
**Energy Charge (¢ per kWh)**  
Tier 1: 0 – 300 kWh |  | 4.640¢  
Tier 2: 301 – 900 kWh |  | 5.138¢  
Tier 3: 901 – 2,000 kWh |  | 7.525¢  
Tier 4: > 2,000 kWh |  | 10.884¢  
Power Supply Adjustment **(¢ per kWh)** | 4.118¢  
PSA Administrative Adjustment (¢ per kWh) | -0.206¢  
Community Benefit Charges **(¢ per kWh)**  
Customer Assistance Program | 0.564¢  
Service Area Lighting | 0.254¢  
Energy Efficiency Programs | 0.457¢  
Regulatory Charge**(¢ per kWh)** | 0.01338¢  
  * **Community Benefit Charges** — These charges help fund City services like customer assistance, street lighting, and energy efficiency programs.   
  

  * **Customer Charge** — This charge helps cover the fixed costs of billing, metering, collections, customer service, and other account management services.  
  

  * **Power Supply Adjustment** — The Power Supply Adjustment is a dollar-for-dollar recovery that includes the cost of fuel for our power plants, the cost of electricity purchased from the grid and any net charges experienced as Austin Energy sells power to the grid. Austin Energy adjusts the Power Supply Adjustment annually to reflect the current price of fuel, projected Austin Energy power purchases, and any existing over/under recovery of those expenses. The utility can make small adjustments to this charge throughout the year, as conditions require.  
  

  * **PSA Administrative Adjustment** — As conditions require throughout the year, Austin Energy can make small changes to the Power Supply Adjustment. These changes allow the utility to better manage its financial health by responding to changing market conditions faster.  
  

  * **Regulatory Charge** — The Regulatory Charge recovers Austin Energy’s costs for using the ERCOT wholesale transmission system and other regulatory fees and charges. Transmission costs are based on Austin Energy’s roughly 4% share of the ERCOT market and determined by the Public Utility Commission of Texas.  
  

  * **Energy Charge** — Austin Energy sells electricity to residential customers in kilowatt-hours. A kilowatt-hour is equal to the energy needed to run one 1,000-watt electric heater or ten 100-watt lights for one hour. A typical residential user consumes 860 kWh per month.  
  
Electric rates for residential customers inside the City of Austin (approximately 85% of residential customers) are organized into four tiers. When a customer’s energy usage increases from tier to tier, the rate per kilowatt-hour also increases for consumption in that tier.

Example: Rates for Inside City of Austin Customers - 860 kWh Line Item | kWh Per Tier | Charges  
---|---|---  
Customer Charge | $16.50  
Tier 1 | 300 | $13.92  
Tier 2 | 560 | $28.77  
Tier 3 | 0 | $0.00  
Tier 4 | 0 | $0.00  
Regulatory Charges |  | $11.51  
Community Benefit Charges |  | $10.97  
Power Supply Adjustment |  | $35.41  
PSA Administrative Adjustment |  | -$1.77  
City Sales Tax 1% | $1.15  
TOTAL BILL | $116.45  
Residential electric bills from Austin Energy tend to be lower when compared to most other utilities in Texas as a result of lower kilowatt-hour use. The lower use comes from energy efficiency tools, higher building standards, and other initiatives supported by Austin Energy.
[Browse our many energy efficiency tips, tools, and rebates](https://savings.austinenergy.com/residential)
### Renewable Energy Options
Many customers are concerned about the carbon impact of their electric power. Those who want to reduce their carbon footprint can choose these additional green power options from Austin Energy:
  * [GreenChoice® 100% Texas wind power](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/greenchoice/greenchoice-renewable-energy "GreenChoice")
  * [Community Solar option](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/for-your-home/community-solar/community-solar "Community Solar option")
  * [Value of Solar rate](https://austinenergy.com/rates/residential-rates/value-of-solar-rate "Value of Solar rate") on [installed on-site solar systems](https://austinenergy.com/green-power/solar-solutions/for-your-home)

If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Residential Utility Services
## City of Austin Utilities for Your Home
The City of Austin provides public utilities to residents of Austin and some surrounding areas. Depending on where you live, you could receive one or more utility services from the City of Austin.
###  Multiple City Utility Services All in One Bill 
Your bill includes charges for all of your City of Austin utility services. It can include charges for drainage, electricity, solid waste, street service, wastewater, and water. 
[Customer service representatives are available to help at our walk-in service centers](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/contact-us/contact-coa-utilities/customer-care) and by telephone. You can also register to manage your account and pay your bill online. 
**Contact Customer Care**
**Phone:** [512-494-9400](tel:5124949400)
VRS calls are accepted
**Toll-free:** 888-340-6465 - outside Austin 
Customer service for electric, water, solid waste, and recycling services with the City of Austin. 
**Get help with:**
  * Residential and commercial utility services 
  * New service, transfer, or service disconnection 
  * Questions about your account or your bill 
  * Deposits and initiation fees 
  * Budget billing 
  * Payment extensions or payment options 
  * Help with high bills


**City of Austin Utilities Online**
**On the web:** [coautilities.com](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home)
Manage your residential or commercial utility services any time, day or night. 
[Register to create your online account](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home)
[Browse Support for helpful information](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/support) on fees and deposits, billing, payment, and customer assistance. 
**Self-service options:**
[Log in to City of Austin Utilities Online Customer Care](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/home) to: 
  * Start, stop, or transfer utility services 
  * Choose your energy source 
  * Pay your bill securely 
  * Sign up for Paperless Billing, Budget Billing, or Autopay 
  * Track your utility usage and get tips to help lower your bill 
  * Set up billing and payment notifications, and more 


###  Browse Support for Helpful Information 
**Start, Stop, or Transfer Residential Service with City of Austin Utilities**
####  Utility Service 
The City of Austin provides public utilities to residents of Austin and some surrounding areas. 
  * [Start, Stop, or Transfer Service](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/utility-service/start-stop-transfer "null")

**Billing and Payment Options for Residential Customers**
####  Billing 
Understand items on your utility bill and know your utility bill options, like Budget Billing and Paperless Bills. 
  * [Billing Overview](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/billing/billing-overview "null")
  * [Budget Billing](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/billing/budget-billing "null")
  * [Paperless Billing](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/billing/paperless "null")
  * [Bill Disputes](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/billing/bill-disputes "null")


####  Payment 
Convenient payment options are available anytime, day or night. 
  * [Payment Overview](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-overview "null")
  * [Autopay](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/autopay)
  * [Pay Online](https://dss-coa.opower.com/)
  * [Quick Payment](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/quick-payment "null")
  * [Pay in Person](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/in-person "null")
  * [Pay by Mail](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/by-mail "null")
  * [Payment Extension](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-extension)
  * [Payment Arrangement](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-arrangement "null")
  * [Payment Arrangement FAQs](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-arrangement)
  * [Collection FAQs](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/payment/payment-collection-faqs)
  * [Customer Assistance Programs (CAP)](https://coautilities.com/wps/wcm/connect/occ/coa/util/support/customer-assistance)

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.

Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.

# Report a Problem
## If You See A Problem, We Need to Know
We work hard to prevent serious problems and we monitor our systems in order to identify issues quickly. But we also appreciate it when our customers tell us about problems like power outages, downed power lines, electricity theft, or suspected telephone scams. 
###  Power Outages 
Tree limbs, storms, vehicles hitting electric poles, and even small animals can cause power outages or downed power lines. 
  * **If you have a power outage** — [Report outages and sign up for text message alerts](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages) or call us at **512-322-9100**. 
  * **If you see a downed power line** — [Stay away and stay safe!](https://austinenergy.com/about/Electrical-Safety) Call **512-322-9100** to report downed power lines. 


###  Waiting to Start Electric Service at a New Address? 
Whether you are new to Austin Energy or transferring service to a different address, you can sign up to [Get Outage Alerts](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages/Outage-Alerts) after the start-of-service date. 
![Monitor Your Outage](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Residential/Images/flashLightFeature2.jpg?rev=05ccc2d346a944a0b6734a03a31fdd96&w=300&hash=135E57E03E7867A0A73E84E445BD46EB)
[Report Outages and Get Alerts](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages)
Report power outages easily online or by using your mobile device.
[Learn More](https://austinenergy.com/outages/report-outages)
###  Theft and Scams 
Electricity theft and telephone scams are illegal and sometimes dangerous activities that should be reported immediately. 
  * **If you suspect electricity theft** — call **512-972-7475** to report it anonymously. 
  * **If you receive a suspicious phone call from someone who asks you to make a utility bill payment over the phone** — hang up and dial **3-1-1** or **512-974-2000** to report the call and check on your account status. 
  * **If you receive a suspicious phone call or visit from someone who wants to sell you solar panels, saying they work for Austin Energy** — hang up or tell the visitor that you are not interested, and dial 3-1-1 or 512-974-2000 to report the call or visit. 


###  Learn More 
  * [Learn how to stay safe when a power line is down ](https://austinenergy.com/about/Electrical-Safety)
  * [Learn how to report electricity theft](https://austinenergy.com/residential/report-a-problem/report-electricity-theft "Learn more about electricity theft")
  * [Learn more about telephone scams](https://austinenergy.com/residential/report-a-problem/report-telephone-scams "Learn more about telephone scams")

# Tree Trimming
## Tree Trimming and Vegetation Management
###  Austin Energy Forestry Division 
Austin Energy takes our responsibility to deliver safe and reliable energy to our customers seriously. Expert tree trimming and vegetation management help make that possible. 
Weather and vegetation cause more than one in three outages in our area. 
  * During windy and stormy weather, swaying and broken tree limbs can rub against wires or bring down power lines. 
  * In extreme cold, ice can add heavy weight and bring wires in contact with trees which may also lead to down power lines. 
  * All of this can cause service fluctuations, widespread outages, hazardous conditions and fires. 


Trees that grow too closely to power lines also pose an unnecessary risk to customers who depend on uninterrupted power for life support. 
Untrimmed trees: 
  * Increase the likelihood of fires from arcing electricity. 
  * May cause electrical shock, serious injuries or fatalities to anyone who comes into close contact with an energized tree. 
  * The National Electrical Safety Code requires Austin Energy to keep branches clear of power lines. And, we want to do our part to keep the community safe and protect our customers from power line hazards. 


![Lineworker trimming trees](https://austinenergy.com/-/media/Project/Websites/AustinEnergy/Residential/Tree-Trimming-Images-and-PDFs/residential-tree-pruning.jpg?rev=c90655dc43f84128be6c6b08d63fcb82&w=300&hash=9936BBF9E5434AD9106EA887ADEFC442)
[Request Tree Trimming Services](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/tree_pruning_request_form "Request Tree Trimming Services")
Complete an online form to request tree trimming near power lines.
[Request Service](https://austinenergy.formstack.com/forms/tree_pruning_request_form "Request Tree Trimming Services")
###  Benefits of Proper Tree Trimming 
Managing trees and other vegetation near energized power lines maintains public safety. Proper vegetation management also: 
  * Improves electric reliability by preventing some of the most common causes of outages. 
  * Prevents damage to electrical infrastructure. 
  * Provides utility crews safe access to equipment for repairs, which allows for quicker power restoration. 
  * Protects and promotes the health of your trees. 
  * Supports the City of Austin's and the [Austin Fire Department's Firewise Program](http://www.austintexas.gov/department/wildfire) and enhances public safety awareness to minimize tree/wire conflicts to reduce fire risk. 


####  When Trees Are Not Properly Maintained 
  * Improper vegetation management — trees that have not been adequately trimmed and other vegetation that encroaches on power lines — is responsible for many outages. 
  * Some of these outages require lengthy restoration times, as they require extensive trimming and multiple crews to repair power line damage. 
  * Improper vegetation management can also be responsible for voltage fluctuations or "momentary" outages, as branches can scrape across lines even on "blue sky" days.


Storm Response and Debris Removal
During widespread storm events, power restoration is our priority. Branches can break off or sag and damage power lines — especially during storms with heavy winds, hail, sleet, and ice. 
Often, our crews must trim damaged tree limbs before safely repairing the electric system. 
Austin Energy will not remove debris or brush that results from power restoration. Check the [Austin Resource Recovery](https://www.austintexas.gov/resource-recovery/programs/residential-services "Austin Resource Recovery Residential Brush Collection Schedule") residential guidelines and schedule for curbside brush collection. Customers outside of the City of Austin should contact their local municipality. 
###  Trimming Cycles and Practices 
In 2019, Austin Energy increased our tree trimming clearances to increase reliability and safety and to keep our customers and communities safe. These clearances help us adapt to and address the increasing threat of wildfire and extreme weather. 
These tree trimming clearances mean trees will be trimmed to keep limbs clear of the power lines for seven years. However, some fast-growing species may require trimming during the mid-point of cycles to maintain proper clearances from energized lines. 
These trimming cycles are ideal to protect the health of your trees, ensure public safety and electric reliability, and assist with reducing the significant expense of tree trimming. 
Austin Energy's trimming cycle requires work planning along more than 2,400 miles of power lines. Each year, hundreds of miles of Austin Energy power lines are scheduled for tree trimming or tree removal on 9,000 to 12,000 properties a year. 
Austin Energy's Forestry Division uses three contractors to help with tree trimming across the service area. The three contractors are: Asplundh, Davey Tree, and Wright. 
####  Standard Clearances: 
  * Fast-growing species (e.g., Ligustrum, China Berry, Hackberry, and Pecan): 15 ft. 
  * Slow-growing species (e.g., Cedar, Cedar Elm, and Juniper): 10 ft. 


####  Factors We Consider When Trimming Trees: 
  * Tree species 
  * Time of year 
  * Oak wilt and bird habitats — We make every effort to avoid trimming red oak and live oak trees between February and June when oak wilt is more likely to spread. To protect bird habitat areas, when possible, we avoid trimming from March to September (applies to undeveloped areas west of MoPac). 
  * Circuit, line fuses, and customer ticket requests — We trim trees along a circuit from beginning to end on maintenance schedules. We trim trees along a line fuse section or area identified in a ticket request. If a portion of the circuit or line fuse is not trim and a tree limb falls on the line, the entire area may experience a power outage. 


###  For More Information 
  * Please visit our [Tree Trimming FAQs](https://austinenergy.com/residential/residential-services/tree-trimming/faqs "Tree Pruning Frequently Asked Questions") to find answers to commonly raised questions about our tree trimming program. 
  * If you need more information, please call Customer Care at **512-494-9400** or email the Austin Energy Forestry Division.

##### About Our Translations
×
As a department of the City of Austin, Austin Energy uses an independent, online tool to provide automated (machine) translations on our websites. As with any machine translation, context and accuracy cannot be guaranteed.
If you experience difficulty with our translated text or need assistance, please call 512-494-9400 or 3-1-1 to speak with a representative. Thank you.
  

Como departamento de la Ciudad de Austin, Austin Energy utiliza una herramienta en línea independiente para proporcionar traducciones automáticas en nuestros sitios web. Como cualquier traducción automática, no se puede garantizar el contexto y la precisión.
Si tiene dificultades con nuestro texto traducido o necesita ayuda, llame al 512-494-9400 o al 3-1-1 para hablar con un representante. Gracias.
  

作为Austin市的一个部门，Austin能源部使用独立的在线工具提供网站的自动（机器）翻译。与任何机器翻译一样，我们无法保证翻译准确无误并符合语境。
如果您在使用我们的翻译文本时遇到困难或需要帮助，请致电512-494-9400或3-1-1告诉客服。谢谢。
  

Là một bộ phận của Thành phố Austin, Austin Energy sử dụng một công cụ trực tuyến, độc lập để cung cấp các bản dịch tự động (máy tính) trên các trang web của chúng tôi. Như với bất kỳ bản dịch bằng máy nào, ngữ cảnh và độ chính xác không thể được đảm bảo.
Nếu quý vị gặp khó khăn với văn bản đã dịch của chúng tôi hoặc cần được hỗ trợ. Vui lòng gọi số 512-494-9400 hoặc 3-1-1 để nói chuyện với một người đại diện. Xin cảm ơn quý vị.
